headline: Boston Scientific Recalls Test Cardiac Device Quality And Investor Confidence
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) has initiated two voluntary recalls of its LUX-Dx II arrhythmia detector and alarm devices. The recalls follow FDA enforcement reports citing failures in data collection and monitoring of critical cardiac events for certain patients. Issues include discrepancies in device programming interfaces that affect reliability of arrhythmia monitoring and treatment decisions. The recalls are ongoing and affect patients and clinicians in multiple regions, including the US...
